_comment: Capital allocation logic. Controls how much to deploy per signal and for different amounts of available cash.
_note_amounts: The dashboard shows best use of cash for each of these amounts (in EUR).
_note_bonus: If an ETF opportunity would reduce concentration risk, add this % to its allowed size.
_note_limits: Never suggest less than min or more than max per single trade.
_note_penalty: If sector/theme concentration is high, multiply suggested size by this factor.
_note_hcm: For conviction >= 9 assets, allow up to 20% more than the base tier suggests.
